summary: Iteration 3 - verified fix for broken FixMyCar logo. GET /logo.png returns 200 with content-type image/png and content-length 2385940. On all 8 routes (/, /services, /sos, /gallery, /about, /contact, /book, /services/battery-jump-start), the header inside [data-testid='nav-logo'] loads successfully with complete=true, naturalWidth=1536, naturalHeight=1024, currentSrc pointing to https:///logo.png. Favicon resolves to https:///logo.png on all pages. 'FixMyCar' text is still present next to the header logo (anchor class 'flex items-center gap-2 group shrink-0' - floating pill nav classes preserved). Regression checks pass: phone '9281410305' NOT present on / and /sos body text, IS present on /contact. Footer logo (mobile 390x844) also renders successfully (naturalWidth=1536, complete=true). Mobile menu (Sheet) opened via [data-testid='nav-mobile-toggle'] and screenshot visually confirmed the logo image renders inside the sheet next to 'FixMyCar' text. 'Made by iDesign4u' badge with purple gradient is visible bottom-left (visually confirmed in screenshot; scripted offsetParent check was a false-negative for position:fixed elements). No broken-image state anywhere.

issues: Radix DialogContent console warnings: missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for accessibility. Wrap the title in VisuallyHidden or provide a SheetTitle/SheetDescription. Non-blocking but a11y issue.

action_items: Optional: add SheetTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) inside mobile Sheet in Navigation.jsx to remove Radix a11y console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Logo now self-hosted at /app/frontend/public/logo.png (2.3 MB). Consider optimizing/compressing the PNG or converting to WebP - a 2.3MB header logo hurts page-load performance, especially on mobile. Consider srcset with smaller variants (e.g., 96w, 192w, 512w) since the img renders at ~40px height in the header.
The favicon uses the same 2.3MB PNG - browsers will download the full file for a 32x32 favicon; recommend a dedicated small favicon (favicon.ico or logo-32.png).
Radix Sheet in mobile nav is missing SheetTitle - causes accessibility warnings in console.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 confirms the FixMyCar logo fix is working end-to-end. /logo.png is served same-origin with HTTP 200, image/png, 2.3MB. All 8 routes render the header logo (naturalWidth=1536, naturalHeight=1024). Favicon and footer logo also work. Mobile menu logo visually confirmed via screenshot. Regression checks preserved (phone absent on /,/sos and present on /contact; badge visible; 'FixMyCar' text intact; floating pill nav classes intact). Non-blocking observations: (a) 2.3MB PNG is oversized for a header logo/favicon and should be optimized, (b) Radix Sheet in Navigation.jsx generates a11y console warnings due to missing SheetTitle.
rca of the issue: Prior iteration 2 loaded logo from an external customer-assets URL which suffered from customer-side cache/CORS issues resulting in broken image glyph on the user's side. Fix moved the PNG to /app/frontend/public/logo.png and updated BRAND.logo = '/logo.png' plus favicon href to '%PUBLIC_URL%/logo.png'. CRA replaces %PUBLIC_URL% at build time so favicon resolves to same-origin /logo.png. This eliminates external dependency, CORS, and cache issues. Verified: curl HEAD returns 200 image/png; browser reports complete=true and non-zero natural dimensions on every route.
